colorMode.toggle: Switch between dark and light mode

hero.copy: Z-CMS is a next-generation open-source content platform. It pairs the friendly editing experience of a traditional CMS with a modern architecture built on Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL and Redis.

mock.aria: A preview of a website built with Z-CMS

about.title: An open, flexible CMS, ready for the next generation of websites.

point1.title: Easy to use
point1.copy: A clear admin, a visual page builder, and a publishing workflow that suits editors and developers alike.

point2.title: No theme limits
point2.copy: An independent Theme Engine to build, install, customise and share themes the way you already expect.

point3.title: Extend with plugins
point3.copy: A Plugin SDK, a permission model and a marketplace let you extend Z-CMS safely, without patching the core.

point4.title: Enterprise ready
point4.copy: Multi-tenancy, RBAC, audit logs, caching, job queues and a cloud-native deployment story.

features.title: Everything you need to publish better.
features.copy: One platform to manage content, design the site and extend what it can do — without locking you into a single theme or a single vendor.

card1.title: Block Page Builder
card1.copy: Compose pages from blocks, store the structure as data, and render it fast on every device.

card2.title: Theme Engine
card2.copy: Templates, layouts, block styles and a settings schema, packaged as an independent, signed theme.

card3.title: Plugin SDK
card3.copy: Extend content types, APIs, admin screens, background jobs and front-end blocks through one standard SDK.

card4.title: Headless API
card4.copy: Use Z-CMS as the content backend for a website, a mobile app, a kiosk or a SaaS product.

card5.title: Developer Experience
card5.copy: TypeScript end to end, a CLI, local development, hot reload and a package-based architecture.

card6.title: Secure by default
card6.copy: Signed packages, a sandboxed plugin runtime, row-level tenant isolation and a strict content security policy.

ecosystem.title: Start with a beautiful theme.
ecosystem.copy: Themes and plugins built by Z-SOFT and the community, every one of them signed and verified. Install them straight from the CMS admin.

latest.title: What we have been writing.
latest.empty: No posts have been published yet. Write one in the admin and it appears here.

developers.title: Extend with code. Keep the core intact.
developers.copy: A standard SDK lets you build themes and plugins as separate packages, test them on their own, and ship them through the Marketplace.

community.title: Software gets better when we build it together.
community.copy: Z-CMS is an open-source project for the developers, designers, content creators and businesses who want to own their platform.
community.github: Read the source and the roadmap

cta.title: Free to build. Free to extend.
